chunks.title: Elijah's Prophecy and Provision at Cherith
chunks.reason: Covers the prophecy of drought and Elijah's initial sustenance by ravens.

chunks.title: Elijah and the Widow at Zarephath
chunks.reason: Describes the move to Sidon, the widow's provision, and the miracle of the flour and oil.

chunks.title: The Widow's Son Restored to Life
chunks.reason: Details the child's illness, Elijah's prayer, and the resurrection.
